title: Teacher: Comprehensive Homework Creation Flow (3-Steps + Image)
description: Verifies the full 3-step wizard for creating a homework with images, MCQs, and timing settings.

steps.description: Click the button with text "إنشاء واجب جديد" or link to /dashboard/create
Type "اختبار لغة عربية متقدم" into the title field (id="input-title")
Type "5" into the time limit field (label="الوقت المحدد")
Type "ما عاصمة مصر؟" into the first question text (id="q-text-0")
Type "القاهرة" into the first option field
Select the first option as correct (radio button near option 0)

title: Teacher: Save Homework as Draft
description: Verifies that a teacher can save a homework as a draft using the Save as Draft button.

steps.description: Type "مسودة واجب تجريبي" into the title field
Verify the homework appears with a "Draft" or "مسودة" label

title: Student: Join and Solve Homework via Public Link
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated student can join a homework and submit answers.

steps.description: Navigate to a public homework link (e.g., /hw/SAMPLE)
Type "أحمد محمد" into the name input field (data-testid="student-name-input")
Select the correct option for the question (data-testid="quiz-option-0")
Click the "إنهاء وتصحيح الواجب" or "السؤال التالي" button (data-testid="submit-quiz-btn" or data-testid="next-question-btn")
Verify result screen shows details and score

title: Dashboard: Real-time Ranking and Results Update
description: Verifies the teacher dashboard shows updated rankings and statistics.

steps.description: Verify student "أحمد محمد" appears in the rankings
Verify stats like "متوسط الدرجات" are visible
